run_id.description: Unique identifier for this single execution run

strategy.description: Experiment strategy used: A (Single LLM), C (Multi-Agent), or E (Multi-Agent + A-RAG)

valid_run.description: True if the run executed without catastrophic infra failures

pass1_public.description: Did the initial (Pass@1) response pass all public unit tests?

pass1_hidden.description: Did the initial (Pass@1) response pass all hidden unit tests?

pass1_public_tests_passed.description: Number of public tests passed in Pass@1

pass1_hidden_tests_passed.description: Number of hidden tests passed in Pass@1

final_public.description: Did the final version pass all public unit tests after repairs?

final_hidden.description: Did the final version pass all hidden unit tests after repairs?

public_tests_passed.description: Final number of public tests passed

hidden_tests_passed.description: Final number of hidden tests passed

repair_rounds.description: Number of self-repair iteration rounds executed

patch_apply_failures.description: Count of how many times a diff/patch failed to apply cleanly

api_correct.description: 1 if all APIs used actually exist in API_SPEC.md, otherwise 0

hallucinated_api.description: 1 if any non-existent API was hallucinated, otherwise 0

requirement_score.description: Score assigned during manual review for requirement fulfillment: 0 to 2

quality_score.description: Score assigned during manual review for code quality: 1 to 5

tool_calls.description: Number of times a tool was called by the agent workflow

retrieved_tokens.description: Total tokens ingested from retrieval results

retrieval_success.description: True if needed facts were found successfully; null if strategy doesn't support retrieval

input_tokens.description: Total API input tokens used in the run

output_tokens.description: Total API output tokens used in the run

estimated_cost.description: Estimated API execution cost in USD

infra_error.description: True if an infrastructure error occurred during the run

stop_reason.description: The reason the execution loop stopped

manual_review_status.description: Status of the manual review process

artifact_path.description: Relative or absolute file path to the generated/repaired code artifact
